svg.title: Interactive Front Muscle Anatomy Map - ChunkItUp.com
svg.desc: Anatomical diagram showing 34 major muscle groups of the human front body, including pectorals, deltoids, biceps, abs, quadriceps, and calves. Click any muscle to select it for exercise targeting. Each muscle is labeled with its anatomical name, function, and recommended exercises for training.

path.aria-label: Head - Head movement and facial expressions
path.data-muscle-exercises: neck stretches, head rotations
path.data-keywords: head face neck cervical movement

path.aria-label: Sternocleidomastoid - Head rotation and flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: neck flexion, head rotations, neck bridges
path.data-keywords: sternocleidomastoid SCM neck rotation flexion

path.aria-label: Trapezius (Upper) - Shoulder elevation and neck support
path.data-muscle-exercises: shrugs, upright rows, overhead press
path.data-keywords: trapezius upper traps neck shoulders shrugs

path.aria-label: Pectoralis Major - Shoulder flexion, adduction, and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-function: Shoulder flexion, adduction, and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: bench press, push-ups, chest flyes, dips
path.data-keywords: pectoralis major pecs chest bench press push-ups

path.aria-label: Pectoralis Minor - Shoulder blade stabilization
path.data-muscle-exercises: incline bench press, dips, chest dips
path.data-keywords: pectoralis minor upper chest shoulder blade

path.aria-label: Anterior Deltoid - Shoulder flexion and internal rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: overhead press, front raises, push-ups, incline press
path.data-keywords: anterior deltoid front delts shoulders press raises

path.aria-label: Middle Deltoid - Shoulder abduction
path.data-muscle-exercises: lateral raises, overhead press, upright rows
path.data-keywords: middle deltoid lateral delts side shoulders

path.aria-label: Biceps Brachii (Long Head) - Elbow flexion and forearm supination
path.data-muscle-exercises: curls, chin-ups, hammer curls, preacher curls
path.data-keywords: biceps long head arms curls chin-ups

path.aria-label: Biceps Brachii (Short Head) - Elbow flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: concentration curls, close-grip curls, cable curls
path.data-keywords: biceps short head inner arms curls

path.aria-label: Brachioradialis - Elbow flexion and forearm rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: hammer curls, reverse curls, rows
path.data-keywords: brachioradialis forearm elbow flexion grip

path.aria-label: Flexor Carpi Ulnaris - Wrist flexion and grip strength
path.data-muscle-exercises: wrist curls, farmer carries, dead hangs
path.data-keywords: flexor carpi ulnaris wrist forearm grip

path.aria-label: Extensor Carpi Ulnaris - Wrist extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: wrist extensions, reverse curls, farmer carries
path.data-keywords: extensor carpi ulnaris wrist forearm grip

path.aria-label: Hands - Grip and fine motor control
path.data-muscle-exercises: grip trainers, dead hangs, farmer carries
path.data-keywords: hands fingers grip strength

path.aria-label: Serratus Anterior - Shoulder blade protraction
path.data-muscle-exercises: push-ups, overhead press, pull-overs, ab rollouts
path.data-keywords: serratus anterior boxer muscle core abs

path.aria-label: External Obliques (Upper) - Torso rotation and side flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: Russian twists, side planks, wood chops, oblique crunches
path.data-keywords: obliques side abs core rotation twists

path.aria-label: External Obliques (Lower) - Hip flexion and rotation
path.data-muscle-exercises: hanging leg raises, bicycle crunches, side planks
path.data-keywords: obliques lower abs core hip flexion

path.aria-label: Rectus Abdominis (Upper) - Spinal flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: crunches, sit-ups, cable crunches
path.data-keywords: rectus abdominis upper abs six pack crunches

path.aria-label: Rectus Abdominis (Middle) - Spinal flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: crunches, planks, leg raises
path.data-keywords: rectus abdominis middle abs core six pack

path.aria-label: Rectus Abdominis (Lower) - Hip flexion and spinal stabilization
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg raises, reverse crunches, mountain climbers
path.data-keywords: rectus abdominis lower abs core leg raises

path.aria-label: Rectus Abdominis - Spinal flexion and core stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: crunches, planks, leg raises, sit-ups
path.data-keywords: rectus abdominis six pack abs core crunches

path.aria-label: Tensor Fasciae Latae - Hip flexion and abduction
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg raises, lunges, squats, hip abduction
path.data-keywords: tensor fasciae latae TFL hip flexion IT band

path.aria-label: Pectineus - Hip flexion and adduction
path.data-muscle-exercises: adductor machine, squats, lunges
path.data-keywords: pectineus hip adductor inner thigh

path.aria-label: Adductor Longus - Hip adduction
path.data-muscle-exercises: adductor machine, side lunges, sumo squats
path.data-keywords: adductor longus inner thigh hip adduction

path.aria-label: Gracilis - Hip adduction and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: leg curls, adductor exercises, side lunges
path.data-keywords: gracilis inner thigh hip adduction

path.aria-label: Sartorius - Hip and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: lunges, leg raises, cycling
path.data-keywords: sartorius hip knee flexion longest muscle

path.aria-label: Rectus Femoris - Knee extension and hip flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, leg press, lunges, leg extensions
path.data-keywords: rectus femoris quadriceps quads knee extension

path.aria-label: Vastus Lateralis - Knee extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, leg press, lunges, leg extensions
path.data-keywords: vastus lateralis quadriceps outer quad knee

path.aria-label: Vastus Medialis - Knee extension and stability
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, leg extensions, lunges, step-ups
path.data-keywords: vastus medialis quadriceps inner quad teardrop VMO

path.aria-label: Knees - Leg flexion and extension
path.data-muscle-exercises: squats, lunges, leg curls, leg extensions
path.data-keywords: knees knee joint leg movement

path.aria-label: Peroneus Longus - Ankle eversion and plantar flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: calf raises, ankle circles, balance work
path.data-keywords: peroneus longus lateral calf ankle eversion

path.aria-label: Gastrocnemius - Ankle plantar flexion and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-function: Ankle plantar flexion and knee flexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: standing calf raises, jump rope, box jumps
path.data-keywords: gastrocnemius calves calf raises jumping

path.aria-label: Tibialis Anterior - Ankle dorsiflexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: toe raises, ankle dorsiflexion, heel walks
path.data-keywords: tibialis anterior shin ankle dorsiflexion

path.aria-label: Extensor Digitorum Longus - Toe extension and ankle dorsiflexion
path.data-muscle-exercises: toe raises, ankle exercises, barefoot walking
path.data-keywords: extensor digitorum longus toe extension ankle

path.aria-label: Feet - Balance, stability, and propulsion
path.data-muscle-exercises: toe raises, balance exercises, barefoot training
path.data-keywords: feet foot muscles balance stability
